name: Adipose MSC-derived exosomes
summary: Adipose MSC-derived exosomes are normalized for the allogeneic adipose mesenchymal stromal-cell exosome trial evidence in Alzheimer disease.
mechanism_summary: Represents secretome/exosome delivery from adipose mesenchymal stromal cells, with clinical evidence bounded to safety and exploratory disease-specific cognition signals.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Adipose MSC exosomes had exploratory Alzheimer's cognition signal; Allogenic adipose MSC exosomes Alzheimer's phase I/II trial.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
